title: Senior Software Engineer - Mastech Holdings - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Mastech Holdings - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Mastech Holdings in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mastech Holdings:
Mastech Holdings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings!
